Compliance.description: ICASA licensed and compliant per 2024/25 report; no fines or violations in 2025/26. Past issues resolved.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.37/5 (6,726 reviews), NPS -54; dominant complaints on service quality despite 100% response rate.

Product Value.description: Competitive entry pricing and flexibility score well, but low satisfaction impacts perceived value.

Innovation.description: Pioneered standalone 5G home, bundles with 4G mobile; no standout mobile innovations.

Customer Support.description: Quick responses but poor resolution rates per reviews; mixed agent experiences.

Accessibility & Security.description: Standard mobile security with no recent breaches since 2021 minor incident; POPIA compliant terms. Decent but unremarkable.

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter 2.37/5 poor; Trustpilot 4.3/5 mixed service focus
